entities.name: The Coasting Problem
entities.context: A quiet failure mode where employees with impressive tenure and titles have actually been passively existing without ownership over outcomes

entities.name: Self-Reported Credentials
entities.context: Credentials that can be fabricated, purchased, or stolen - identified as a systemic vulnerability in filtering systems

entities.name: Credential Fraud
entities.context: Dramatic failure mode involving fabricated, purchased, or stolen credentials

relationships.context: Systems relying on self-reported credentials are vulnerable to fraud
Coasting is enabled by credential systems that don't verify actual contributions behind titles and tenure
